d: Parisa marks a non-marked enemy with a flower until the battle ends, dealing [[480%]]<ATK> damage to all floral-marked targets and other enemies within [[1]] tiles of them. If the skill hits the targets multiple times within [[2]]s, the subsequent damage dealt by targets is reduced by [[20%]].
Increases damage to [[490%]]<ATK>.
Each defeated enemy who carries Floral Mark grants Parisa [[60]] Energy recovery per second in [[5]]s.
Increases damage to [[510%]]<ATK>.
Increases damage to [[520%]]<ATK>.
Parisa increases ATK SPD by [[22]] and normal attack damage by [[22%]] for [[10]]s for herself and [[1]] nearest ally.
Increases ATK SPD by [[25]], and the normal attack damage by [[25%]].
Increases ATK SPD by [[28]], and the normal attack damage by [[28%]].
Increases ATK SPD by [[30]], and the normal attack damage by [[30%]].

After every [[3]] normal attacks, Parisa launches a bouquet of flowers that gradually expands toward her target, dealing [[200%]]<ATK> damage to all enemies along the path. Each enemy hit by flowers restores herself an extra [[70]] Energy. Every bouquet of flowers can recover her Energy up to [[3]] times.
The flowers deal [[205%]]<ATK> damage.
The flowers deal [[210%]]<ATK> damage.
The flowers deal [[215%]]<ATK> damage.
Increases ATK by [[12%]] during battle.
Increases ATK by [[16%]] during battle.
Increases ATK by [[20%]] during battle.
Parisa marks the nearest enemy in a [[symmetrical]] position with a flower when a battle starts.
Normal attacks hit [[1]] more target after inflicting [[4]] marks.
Normal attacks hit [[1]] more target after inflicting [[3]] marks.
Normal attacks hit [[1]] more target after inflicting [[2]] marks.

r.d: In Rivalry Mode, casting an Ultimate increases damage dealt by [[8%]] for the next [[8]]s. Unstackable. The first Ultimate cast also permanently increases Energy recovery from attacking by [[8%]].
Lvl. 4 Refinement: In Rivalry Mode, increases 16 ATK SPD, 10 DEF Penetration.

d: Reduces the required normal attacks to trigger Flower Power by [[1]].

Floral Inspiration no longer has an initial cooldown. After this skill is cast for the first time, Floral Inspiration targets [[1]] extra allies, prioritizing those who have dealt the most normal attack damage.
